extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by the entities from matters against them: I counted only the “Against” rows, namely 4 criminal proceedings against directors, 2 statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, and tax proceedings of 6 against the Company plus 5 against subsidiaries; I excluded all “By” rows and the promoter’s personal tax proceeding. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹354.91 million for the Company plus ₹11.33 million for subsidiaries, totaling ₹366.24 million, or ₹36.624 crore; the directors’ and promoters’ amounts are not quantifiable and are excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated bank-guarantees amount of ₹3.91 million as of September 30, 2025, converted to ₹0.391 crore without re-summing. The company-wide top-five and top-ten customer concentrations are for Fiscal 2025 and equal 43.35% and 58.71%, respectively, measured against revenue from operations; the source unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
